name: SQL Injection Testing
description: SQL injection detection and database enumeration tool.
long_description: SQLMap detects SQL injection vulnerabilities against parameterized URLs such as http://testphp.vulnweb.com/listproducts.php?cat=1. Standard scans confirm injectable parameters, while advanced scans can enumerate databases and schema information. Database enumeration output lists discovered DBMS names and should only be performed against systems you own or are explicitly authorized to assess. Intrusive options may alter application behavior, so use with caution.

fields.label: Target URL

validation.message: Must be a valid HTTP/HTTPS URL

fields.help: Full URL containing the parameter to test (for example http://testphp.vulnweb.com/listproducts.php?cat=1). Include http:// or https:// and only test systems you own or are authorized to assess.

fields.label: Scan Preset
fields.help: Quick performs low-risk checks. Aggressive increases level and risk values and enables database enumeration.

fields.label: Test Level (1-5)
fields.help: Level of tests to perform (1-5). Higher levels send more payloads and take longer.

fields.label: Test Risk (1-3)
fields.help: Risk of payloads (1-3). Higher values are more intrusive and may affect application behavior.

fields.label: Enumerate Databases
fields.help: List database names discovered on the target. Enumeration is intrusive and should only be used in authorized environments.

safety.consent_message: SQL injection attacks are highly intrusive and modify database states. ONLY run this against systems you own.
